site.name: Villa Laura
site.tagline: A calm Sardinian stay above the sea.
site.description: Villa Laura is a simple, elegant guest-support site with practical guidance, video walkthroughs, and direct links for help during your stay in Sardinia.

hero.title: Everything guests need for a smooth stay at Villa Laura.
hero.body: Use this page for quick house guidance, practical videos, useful local information, and direct support while you are at the house.

about.title: A warm, easy base for Sardinian days.
about.body: Villa Laura is designed for relaxed stays with sea views, bright interiors, and the practical comforts guests need when travelling with family or friends. This site keeps key information in one place so it stays easy to use on a phone.

highlights: Sea-view setting with a calm, airy atmosphere
Simple help resources for appliances and house access
Direct WhatsApp contact for support during the stay
Airbnb listing available for bookings and full property details

guideSections.title: Arrival and access
items: Use the keys and door guide videos before your first arrival.
Keep the house keys together to avoid confusion when locking up.
If anything feels unclear, message on WhatsApp for the fastest response.

guideSections.title: Inside the house
items: Appliance videos cover the TV, oven, hood, washing machine, dishwasher, microwave, cooktop, air conditioning, and workstation.
For the best experience, watch the short guide before using an appliance for the first time.
Please treat the house as a lived-in home and leave everything switched off when going out.

guideSections.title: Before leaving
items: Check doors and windows carefully before departure.
Return all keys to the agreed place and confirm departure on WhatsApp.
If anything was damaged or not working during the stay, report it before check-out so it can be handled quickly.

localInfo.title: Support
localInfo.text: WhatsApp is the main support channel during the stay.

localInfo.title: Bookings
localInfo.text: All reservations are handled through Airbnb.

localInfo.title: Videos
localInfo.text: The full guide library is also available on the Villa Laura YouTube channel.

videos.title: How to Use the TV
videos.description: Quick guide on how to turn on the TV, change channels, and access streaming apps.
notes: Use the remote shown in the video first, then switch inputs only if needed.
If apps are already signed in, please avoid changing account settings.

videos.title: How to Use the Oven
videos.description: Step-by-step instructions for turning on the oven, adjusting temperature, and using basic functions.
notes: Let the oven preheat before cooking for more even results.
Make sure it is switched off fully before leaving the house.

videos.title: How to Use the Kitchen Hood
videos.description: How to switch on the kitchen hood, adjust the fan speed, and use the lights.
notes: Use the hood while cooking to keep the kitchen fresh.
Leave it running briefly after cooking if needed.

videos.title: How to Use the Washing Machine
videos.description: Simple guide on selecting programs, adding detergent, and starting a wash cycle.
notes: Do not overload the machine.
Use the detergent amount recommended for a small household load.

videos.title: How to Use the Dishwasher
videos.description: Instructions for loading dishes, adding detergent, and choosing the correct program.
notes: Scrape off food before loading.
Open the door slightly after the cycle if you want dishes to dry faster.

videos.title: How to Use the Microwave
videos.description: Basic instructions on heating food, setting time, and using main functions.
notes: Use microwave-safe containers only.
Avoid metal or foil unless clearly approved for microwave use.

videos.title: How to Use the Cooktop
videos.description: How to turn on the cooktop, adjust heat levels, and use it safely.
notes: Use pans sized to the cooking zone where possible.
Check that everything is switched off after cooking.

videos.title: How to Use the Air Conditioning
videos.description: How to turn on the AC, adjust temperature, and switch between modes.
notes: Keep doors and windows closed for the best cooling performance.
Use moderate settings to keep the house comfortable and efficient.

videos.title: How to Use Doors and Locks
videos.description: Instructions on opening, closing, and locking doors safely.
notes: Always check doors are fully closed before locking.
Use gentle pressure if a door needs alignment rather than forcing it.

videos.title: How to Use the Keys
videos.description: Explanation of which keys to use and how to lock and unlock the property.
notes: Keep keys together to avoid mixing them up.
If a key feels stiff, stop and check that you are using the right one.

videos.title: How to Use the Workstation
videos.description: Guide to using the desk area, power outlets, and workspace setup.
notes: The workstation is intended for light work and charging devices.
Please unplug personal equipment when leaving.

contact.title: Need help during your stay?
contact.body: For the fastest support, send a WhatsApp message. For bookings, availability, and full listing details, use Airbnb.
